sections.text: These are local prototype queries, not live hosted searches. Each is fixture-backed or fixture-adjacent, and external baselines remain pending/manual.

panels.title: Static Resolver Demo Snapshots
paragraphs: Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0 publishes fixed no-JS examples for selected fixture-backed queries and result shapes. They are not live searches or API calls.

rows: Old-platform intent, utility/app records, source and lane summaries.
latest Firefox before XP support ended
Latest-compatible intent, Windows XP compatibility evidence, release-note-style evidence.
old blue FTP client for XP

Exact identity remains bounded by fixture evidence.
